name: io.github.ex3lite/mcp-rzd-tickets
title: RZD Tickets MCP
description: Read-only MCP server for RZD trains, cars, seats, adjacent pairs and car photos.

environmentVariables.name: RZD_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 20000.

environmentVariables.name: RZD_PROXY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional http, https, socks4 or socks5 proxy URL. Leave empty for direct requests.
